title: Command Window Keys
description:
Command Window Keys

Command Window Keys

Key	Action

Ctrl+A	Select entire window.

Ctrl+C	Stop the program and initialize robot controller.
  If a robot motion command is in progress, the prompt will return when the command has been completed.

Ctrl+V or Shift+Ins	Execute Paste command. Paste from Clipboard to current selection.

Ctrl+W	Re-display last command line after the prompt.

Ctrl+X or Shift+Del	Execute Cut command. Cut current selection and put in Clipboard.

Ctrl+Z	Undo last change.

Ctrl+Home	Go to the top of the window.

Ctrl+End	Go to last prompt at end of the window.

?	Translates to "PRINT " when used as the first character of a command.  This can be used to display variables or any statement that requires a PRINT command.
